triplets.aligned_use: In voices:zhuangzi, use 'transformation without closure' only with an explicit probe, receipt, status, or bounded next move.
triplets.unsafe_use: Bare 'transformation without closure' as vibe, conclusion, or authority without a probe/receipt/status.
